name: Jab
description: A quick probing strike.
damage_context: [a/an] [verb] snapped backward by a sharp jab.
observer_action: [actor_name] snaps out a quick jab.

name: Overhead Crack
description: A heavy overhead blow that leaves the attacker open.
damage_context: [a/an] [verb] taken by a crushing overhead strike.
observer_action: [actor_name] raises [actor_possessive] weapon and brings it down in a crushing arc.

name: Guard Breath
description: Measured breathing and a reset posture aid recovery.
support_context: Measured breaths steady your posture and knit shallow wounds.
observer_action: [actor_name] slows [actor_possessive] breathing and settles into a guarded stance.
observer_context: Measured breaths steady [actor_possessive] posture and knit shallow wounds.

name: Centered Guard
description: A rooted defensive form that lets you bleed force away before it lands.
support_context: You settle into a centered guard, turning the worst of each blow aside.
observer_action: [actor_name] plants [actor_possessive] feet and draws a steady breath.
observer_context: [actor_name] settles into a centered guard that blunts incoming strikes.

name: Bash
observer_action: [actor_name] crashes into [actor_possessive] target with a brutal bash.

name: Pressure Point
description: A precise strike that leaves the target painfully vulnerable.
damage_context: [a/an] [verb] jolted as a precise pressure point is struck.
observer_action: [actor_name] snaps a precise strike at a vulnerable nerve cluster.

name: Roundhouse Kick
description: A sweeping heel-strike that smashes every nearby foe.
damage_context: [a/an] [verb] battered by a whirling roundhouse kick.
observer_action: [actor_name] pivots into a wide roundhouse kick.

name: Fist Flurry
description: A disciplined burst of unarmed strikes that overwhelms your target.
support_context: Your fists blur into a relentless flurry.
observer_action: [actor_name] erupts into a blinding flurry of strikes.

name: Rescue
description: You dive into the press of battle and drag a companion clear of the worst blow.
support_context: You hurl yourself into danger and draw the enemy's fury away.
observer_action: [actor_name] lunges into the melee to rescue an ally.
observer_context: [actor_name] throws [actor_possessive] body between an ally and danger.

name: Bone Rake
description: A brutal hooking strike meant to drag an opponent off balance.
damage_context: [a/an] [verb] hooked hard by a splintering rake of bone and iron.
observer_action: [actor_name] lunges in with a jagged, dragging strike.

name: Censer Guard
description: The wielder circles smoke and chain to draw breath and steady the body.
support_context: A ring of bitter incense steadies the breath and closes the edge of pain.
observer_action: [actor_name] swings a censer in a tight warding circle.
observer_context: A faint ring of incense-smoke settles around [actor_name].

name: Briar Gore
description: A brutal driving hit that tosses the target into thorn and root.
damage_context: [a/an] [verb] smashed backward into biting briars by the charge!
observer_action: [actor_name] lowers [actor_possessive] head and drives forward in a savage rush.

name: Thorn Trample
description: A crushing rush that leaves the target tangled and off-balance.
damage_context: [a/an] [verb] driven into the ground beneath trampling hooves!
observer_action: [actor_name] surges through in a trampling storm of muscle and mud.

name: Mindlash Feint
description: A cruel royal feint that snaps the target's focus before the real blow lands.
damage_context: [a/an] [verb] snapped sideways by a feint that lashes both body and mind!
observer_action: [actor_name] blurs sideways and lashes out with a spiteful royal feint.

name: Wingstorm Veil
description: A screen of razor-fast wings and glamour that blunts incoming harm.
support_context: [a/an] [verb] hidden behind a shrieking veil of wings and glamour!
observer_action: [actor_name] whips up a veil of luminous wings.

name: Crownbreak Swipe
description: A punishing close-range strike used by faerie nobility to finish staggered prey.
damage_context: [a/an] [verb] carved open by a contemptuous royal swipe!
observer_action: [actor_name] steps in with regal contempt and slashes hard.

name: Ironhook Rend
description: A savage hooking chop that tears open a guard and leaves the target stumbling.
damage_context: [a/an] [verb] ripped open by a hooking rend!

name: Gutter Step
description: A quick slip across broken footing followed by a low killing strike.
damage_context: [a/an] [verb] cut low from a narrow-angle step!

name: Wallbreaker Swing
description: A full-hip crushing blow meant to pulp ribs through armor and timber alike.

name: Crippling Pitchknife
description: A sudden thrust or thrown knife that leaves the target fighting for balance.
damage_context: [a/an] [verb] thrown off balance by a crippling pitchknife!

name: Plank Guard
description: A rough defensive brace behind shield wood, door planks, and pure stubbornness.
support_context: You hunker behind a brutal plank guard.
observer_action: [actor_name] squares up behind a brutal guard.
observer_context: [actor_name] settles into a stubborn defensive stance.

name: Sundering Cleave
description: A brutal descending cut meant to break stance and bone together.
damage_context: [a/an] [verb] split by a brutal sundering cleave.
observer_action: [actor_name] steps through with a brutal sundering cleave.

name: Grave Guard
description: A steadying martial prayer that restores a measure of health.
support_context: You settle into a grave guard and force your wounds to close.
observer_action: [actor_name] lowers [actor_possessive] stance and gathers grim resolve.
observer_context: [actor_name] settles into a grim defensive rhythm.

name: Sandrush
description: A low rushing charge that uses the dune itself as cover.
damage_context: [a/an] [verb] slammed aside by a sudden sand-hidden rush.
observer_action: [actor_name] bursts forward in a spray of sand.

name: Vow of Endurance
description: A disciplined battle vow that hardens resolve and restores a little health.
support_context: You steady your breath under an old vow and force your body to hold.
observer_action: [actor_name] sets [actor_possessive] feet and murmurs an old battle vow.
observer_context: [actor_name] seems to draw strength from disciplined conviction.
